title: POV: A new feature enters the chat. 🕺✨
summary: Google for Developers posted a lighthearted video titled "POV: A new feature enters the chat" that humorously addresses the challenges software engineers face when new features are introduced. The video features speakers Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King.
writeup: This Google for Developers video uses a lighthearted, humorous framing to depict the challenges software engineers encounter when a new feature is introduced. It is presented as a short comedic skit rather than a technical walkthrough. The speakers are Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King.
